clustered_themes: Use triage lanes to prioritize legal-critical blockers before admin tasks.
Evidence and script consistency remain top avoidable dispute drivers.
Payroll/tax mapping near lock remains a recurrent control weak spot.
Local city-level confirmation should remain mandatory before closure.
source_fit_review.deduplication_note: Rotated from risk-card framing to triage-lanes structure (critical/monitor/routine) to avoid skeleton repetition.
key_uncertainties: Local adjudication standards vary by city.
Settlement tax treatment depends on payment component design.
Late case-fact changes can invalidate prior route assumptions.
